-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strconv%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc backtrack(arr %5B%5Dint, target int, index int) bool %7B%0A%09if target == 0 %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09if target %3C 0 %7C%7C index %3E= len(arr) %7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09return backtrack(arr, target-arr%5Bindex%5D, index+1) %7C%7C%0A%09%09backtrack(arr, target, index+1)%0A%7D%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09parts := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A%09if len(parts) %3C 2 %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09n, _ := strconv.Atoi(parts%5B0%5D)%0A%09k, _ := strconv.Atoi(parts%5B1%5D)%0A%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09numStr := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A%09arr := make(%5B%5Dint, n)%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A%09%09arr%5Bi%5D, _ = strconv.Atoi(numStr%5Bi%5D)%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09if backtrack(arr, k, 0) %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22true%22)%0A%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22false%22)%0A%09%7D
